payload.query: Which came first, the electoral system or the party system? In an essay that provides a critical review of the scholarly literature on party systems and the rules of the game, explain the relationship that exist between the number and types of political parties that exist in a party system and the electoral rules that the countries you discuss have put into place. Be certain to discuss the relationships that exist among the socio-economic characteristics of the countries you discuss as well as their electoral rules and political parties in your effort to deal with the question of which causes which in terms of political parties and electoral institutions.

articles.title: Read the Supreme Court Decision
articles.abstract: The Supreme Court ruled that the race-conscious admissions programs at Harvard and the University of North Carolina were unlawful, curtailing affirmative action at colleges and universities around the nation.
